rules.statement: Non-UI runtime and logic modules MUST use the CORE standard logger for operational output.
Non-UI runtime and logic modules MUST NOT perform terminal-oriented rendering.
rules.rationale: Softened to reporting: dev_sync workflow cluster (reporter, phases) violates this rule and must migrate to src/cli/. Restore to blocking once migration is complete.

rules.statement: CLI surface modules MAY use terminal-oriented rendering for user-facing output.
API modules MUST communicate through structured response mechanisms and MUST NOT use terminal-oriented rendering.
The CORE logger MUST be used for operational logging and MUST NOT be used as a presentation renderer.
